glosses.ja: アルバム; 写真アルバム

sentences.target: J'adore cet album depuis l'été dernier.

translations.fr: J'adore cet album depuis l'été dernier.
translations.en: I’ve loved this album since last summer.
translations.es: Me encanta este álbum desde el verano pasado.
translations.de: Ich liebe dieses Album seit letztem Sommer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从去年夏天开始就很喜欢这张专辑。
translations.yue: 我由上年夏天開始就好鍾意呢隻專輯。
translations.ru: Я люблю этот альбом с прошлого лета.
translations.pt: Eu adoro este álbum desde o verão passado.
translations.he: אני אוהב את האלבום הזה מאז הקיץ שעבר.
translations.tr: Bu albümü geçen yazdan beri çok seviyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thích album này từ mùa hè năm ngoái.
translations.ar: أنا أحب هذا الألبوم منذ الصيف الماضي.
translations.nl: Ik ben sinds afgelopen zomer dol op dit album.
translations.uk: Я люблю цей альбом з минулого літа.
translations.hu: Imádom ezt az albumot a tavalyi nyár óta.
translations.hi: मुझे यह ऐल्बम पिछली गर्मियों से बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Uwielbiam ten album od zeszłego lata.
translations.el: Λατρεύω αυτό το άλμπουμ από το περασμένο καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Jeg har elsket dette albumet siden i fjor sommer.
translations.id: Saya menyukai album ini sejak musim panas lalu.
translations.sv: Jag har älskat det här albumet sedan förra sommaren.
translations.ro: Ador acest album încă de vara trecută.
translations.cs: Tohle album miluju od minulého léta.
translations.da: Jeg har elsket dette album siden sidste sommer.
translations.fi: Olen rakastanut tätä albumia viime kesästä lähtien.
translations.ja: 昨年の夏からこのアルバムが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun je elided before vowel (j') + finite verb adorer, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form used before vowel sound; modifies album.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of adore.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement indicating starting point continuing to present.
Definite article le elided before vowel (l') + noun été (masc. sg.); object of the preposition depuis.
Attributive adjective meaning 'last', masculine singular agreeing with été; placed postnominally.

sentences.target: Tu peux mettre l'album sur la platine.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mɛtʁ l‿albɔm syʁ la platin/

translations.fr: Tu peux mettre l'album sur la platine.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mɛtʁ l‿albɔm syʁ la platin/
translations.en: Can you put the album on the turntable.
translations.es: Pon el disco en el tocadiscos.
translations.de: Leg die Platte auf den Plattenspieler.
translations.vi: Đặt đĩa lên máy đĩa than.
translations.nl: Leg de plaat op de platenspeler.
translations.hu: Tedd fel a lemezt a lemezjátszóra.
translations.hi: रिकॉर्ड को टर्नटेबल पर रख दो.
translations.id: Taruh piringan hitam di meja putar.
translations.ja: ターンテーブルにレコードを置いてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular, selecting an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of the modal peux.
Definite article le elided before vowel (l') + noun album; direct object of mettre.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of platine.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of preposition sur.

translations.de: Sein Album kommt am Freitag raus.
translations.pt: O álbum dele sai na sexta-feira.
translations.vi: Album của anh ấy ra mắt vào thứ Sáu.
translations.hi: उसका ऐल्बम शुक्रवार को जारी होगा.
translations.el: Το άλμπουμ του κυκλοφορεί την Παρασκευή.
translations.nb: Albumet hans kommer ut på fredag.
translations.ja: 彼のアルバムは金曜日に発売される。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular; agrees with album (the possessed), not the possessor.
Common noun, masculine singular; here the subject of the verb sort.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive meaning 'to be released'.
Temporal noun used adverbially to indicate the day; no determiner required.

sentences.target: Nous choisissons un album pour le voyage.

translations.fr: Nous choisissons un album pour le voyage.
translations.en: We’re choosing an album for the trip.
translations.es: Estamos eligiendo un álbum para el viaje.
translations.de: Wir wählen ein Album für die Reise aus.
translations.it: Stiamo scegliendo un album per il viaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为旅途挑选一张专辑。
translations.yue: 我哋為旅程揀一隻專輯。
translations.pt: Estamos escolhendo um álbum para a viagem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chọn một album cho chuyến đi.
translations.ar: हम यात्रा के लिए एक ऐल्बम चुन रहे हैं.
translations.nl: We kiezen een album voor de reis.
translations.hi: हम यात्रा के लिए एक ऐल्बम चुन रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διαλέγουμε ένα άλμπουμ για το ταξίδι.
translations.nb: Vi velger et album til turen.
translations.id: Kami sedang memilih album untuk perjalanan.
translations.sv: Vi väljer ett album till resan.
translations.da: Vi vælger et album til turen.
translations.ja: 旅行のためにアルバムを選んでいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of album.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of choisissons.
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of voyage.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of preposition pour.
